task_completion.description: Verify that a style named 'dynamic_country' is created in the 'ne' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer Styles page showing 'dynamic_country' in the list with workspace 'ne', or the Style editor page showing these details.

task_completion.description: Verify that the SLD style uses the 'env' function with the 'target_country' parameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer SLD editor, the XML code contains an ogc:Function named 'env' (or similar SLD syntax) and references 'target_country'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the SLD style configures the colors #FF0000 (Red) and #CCCCCC (Gray).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer SLD editor, the XML code contains the hex color codes #FF0000 and #CCCCCC.

task_completion.description: Verify that the map image is saved to /home/ga/highlight_brazil.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command (like wget, curl, or mv) saving a file to /home/ga/highlight_brazil.png, or a file manager/image viewer displaying the file at this exact path.

task_completion.description: Verify that the resulting map correctly highlights Brazil in red and other countries in gray.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A map image (in a browser, image viewer, or GeoServer layer preview) showing the world map where the country of Brazil is colored red and all other countries are colored gray. The URL or command should ideally show the parameter env=target_country:Brazil.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with GeoServer to create the style.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GeoServer web interface being used to create and edit the style, or terminal commands making valid API requests to GeoServer.

integrity.description: Verify that the map image is generated by GeoServer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map image is obtained via a WMS request to GeoServer (e.g., using Layer Preview or a curl/wget command with the correct URL parameters), rather than being downloaded from an external source or manually painted.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Workspace: 'ne'
Layer: 'ne_countries'
Style name: 'dynamic_country'
Parameter name: 'target_country'
Highlight color: '#FF0000' (Pure Red)
Base color: '#CCCCCC' (Neutral Gray)
Expected output file: '/home/ga/highlight_brazil.png'
The task requires using the SLD 'env' function to dynamically color a country based on the 'target_country' variable. Brazil must be highlighted in red while the rest of the world is gray.
